name: Real Estate - Lead Automation
target: Real estate agents, agencies, property managers

sequence.name: Initial Outreach
sequence.subject: Quick question about {{company_name}}
sequence.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Just reaching out to see if you're currently handling lead follow-up manually?

We help real estate agencies automatically respond to property inquiries within 60 seconds - even at 2am or weekends when most agents miss calls.

Typically this means 3-5 extra appointments per month that would have otherwise gone to competitors.

Open to a quick chat to see if this would work for {{company_name}}?

Best,
Jakub

sequence.name: Follow-up 1
sequence.subject: Re: Quick question about {{company_name}}
sequence.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Just following up on my last email.

Curious - how do you currently handle inquiries that come in after hours?

Most agencies we work with were losing 30-40% of leads before automating their response system.

Happy to share how it works if you're interested.

Best,
Jakub

sequence.name: Value Add
sequence.subject: Saw this and thought of {{company_name}}
sequence.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

I was reading about how response time affects conversion in real estate - turns out leads contacted within 5 minutes are 21x more likely to convert.

Most agents respond in 45+ minutes. That's a lot of lost deals.

We built a system that handles instant response + qualification automatically, so you only talk to serious buyers.

Worth a 15-min call to see if it fits?

Best,
Jakub

sequence.name: Breakup
sequence.subject: Should I close your file?
sequence.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

I've reached out a few times about helping {{company_name}} automate lead response.

No worries if the timing isn't right - I'll close your file for now.

If things change, feel free to reach out.

Best,
Jakub

P.S. If you're curious, here's a quick 2-min demo of how it works: [CALENDLY_LINK]

opening_lines: Just reaching out to see if you're currently handling lead follow-up manually?
I noticed {{company_name}} has great reviews ({{custom2}}). Quick question for you.
Was looking at {{custom3}} and had a quick question.

personalization: Mention their city for local relevance
For video: Show their website, mention something specific
do_not: Don't include links in first email (hurts deliverability)
Don't be too salesy - focus on curiosity
follow_up_triggers: If they ask questions -> Answer and soft pitch call
If they say 'not interested' -> Ask why, learn for targeting
If they say 'maybe later' -> Set reminder for 30 days
